name: data_storage_calculator
title: data_storage_calculator
summary: Compute the total data storage in a given folder in a given UKB-RAP project

inputSpec.name: project
inputSpec.label: Name of UKB-RAP project
inputSpec.help: Name of UKB-RAP project in which to calculate the data storage.

inputSpec.name: folder
inputSpec.label: Name of folder to search
inputSpec.help: Name of the folder in the UKB-RAP project to be searched (if not a top-level folder then the full path should be given e.g., top_level_folder/folder_to_search).

inputSpec.name: upload_path
inputSpec.label: Directory path for output files
inputSpec.help: Directory to upload results to (should include the project name e.g., project_name:/path/to/directory/). The output directory should be located in the same project in which the applet is run.
